message:
feat(wal): add checkpoint executor and WAL implementation modules

Introduces the WAL (Write-Ahead Logging) subsystem implementation:

- wal.rs: Core WAL file format handling (726 lines) - frame read/write,
  salt management, checksum validation, page recovery, and reader/writer
  lock coordination
- checkpoint_executor.rs: WAL checkpoint logic (630 lines) - PASSIVE,
  FULL, RESTART, and TRUNCATE checkpoint modes with backfill scheduling,
  busy-handler integration, and page-level conflict detection
- lib.rs: Register new submodules in the WAL crate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
